description: tidy the TRT engine cache directory: relocate anything that is NOT a *.engine / *.plan file into <cache>/.quarantine/ so stray build artefacts stop polluting the cache; idempotent and never deletes outright
rules: non-destructive of data — moves stray files into a sibling .quarantine/ subdir; the user reviews and deletes manually
allowlist: only *.engine and *.plan files (and the .quarantine dir) are left in place; everything else is relocated
idempotent — re-running with a clean cache reports 'cache is clean' and changes nothing
set DRY_RUN=1 to report WOULD_MOVE lines without touching any files
CACHE_DIR defaults inside the container to /opt/storage/engines; the perk requires it to be set explicitly
usage: Set CACHE_DIR (the TRT engine cache directory). Optionally set DRY_RUN=1 to preview without moving files. Output: clean-cache.txt (the CLEAN_CACHE report) under record_store.
limitation: Only inspects the top level of CACHE_DIR (non-recursive); a non-quarantine subdirectory is relocated whole rather than recursed into. Fails with no output if CACHE_DIR does not exist.
